product: Sharing streaming tables and materialized views is GA
tagline: Using Delta Sharing to share streaming tables and materialized views is generally available.
what_it_does: Using Delta Sharing to share streaming tables and materialized views is generally available. There are fewer limitations for share recipients and providers when sharing streaming tables and materialized views. This page describes how to read data shared with you using the Databricks to Databricks OpenSharing protocol, where Databricks manages a secure connection for data sharing.
why_it_matters: note If you are creating a catalog from an SAP BDC share, SAP semantic metadata (table and column comments, primary keys, foreign keys, and governance tags) syncs automatically into the catalog.
key_takeaway: Using Delta Sharing to share streaming tables and materialized views is generally available.
